propositions: Duplicated command/tool/config catalogs in README.md should be removed and replaced with short pointers linking to the generated CLI and MCP references.
The dense CLI COMMAND CATALOG (the ~28 rebar <cmd> lines under ## CLI) must be genuinely deleted, not merely re-linked, reducing README line count.
The README must retain its front-door narrative sections (what/why, install, quickstart, how it works) and conceptual ## CLI content that is not duplicated by generated references.
The README must contain no dead relative markdown links after the change.
This ticket is sequenced after the CLI/MCP reference generators and the CI docs-link gate (f088) land so links point at real pages.
